heading: The Word
prose: In the beginning was the word, and the word was with God, and the word was God.
This one was in the beginning with God.
All through him existed, and apart from him existed not even one thing which exists.

heading: John the Baptist
prose: There existed a man being sent by God, the name to him — John.

heading: The Word Became Flesh
prose: And the word became flesh, and tented among us, and we saw his glory, glory as an only child of the father, full of favor and truth.

prose: For the law was given through Moses; the favor and the truth came through Jesus Christ.
No one has seen God at any time; the only born son, the one being in the bosom of the father, that one described him.

prose: And this is the witness of John, when the Jews sent from Jerusalem priests and Levites, that they should ask him, Who are you?

heading: The Lamb of God
prose: The next day John sees Jesus coming to him, and he says, See the lamb of God! the one carrying the sin of the world.
